description: Phase 3 stress scenario. The root deliberately decomposes into >=4 leaves that all want to write to the same report file (file-claim contention) plus a shared install of requests + pandas (install-race contention). One mid-run user_input retires a single leaf to exercise the cancellation flow.

events.author: user
events.summary: Drop the Q4 CSV section from scope — the upstream feed for that quarter is offline this week and we don't want the run blocked on it. Retire any leaf scoped to Q4 and continue with Q1-Q3.
